flows.name: Leave Request Lifecycle
flows.description: An employee submits a leave request from the frontend. The monolith persists it in svc-requests, logs an audit event, and emails the manager via svc-communications-v2.

infraNodes.label: requests-db
infraNodes.description: Stores all leave requests

infraNodes.label: svcEvents-{env}
infraNodes.description: Audit event store

infraNodes.label: svc-events.{env}
infraNodes.description: Event payload archive

infraNodes.label: email-high
infraNodes.description: High-priority email queue

flows.name: Document Generation & E-Signature
flows.description: A manager requests a document. The monolith generates a PDF via svc-documents-v2, starts an e-signature flow, then the frontend polls for the result.

infraNodes.label: documents-pdf.{env}
infraNodes.description: PDF storage bucket

infraNodes.label: esignature-trigger
infraNodes.description: Invokes DocuSign API

infraNodes.label: documents-db
infraNodes.description: Document metadata store

flows.name: AI Auto-Planning Generation
flows.description: A planner requests an AI-optimised schedule. The frontend calls the planning BFF which delegates to svc-automatic-scheduling, then the result is saved to the monolith.

infraNodes.label: auto-schedule-compute
infraNodes.description: ML optimisation job

infraNodes.label: shifts-stream
infraNodes.description: Real-time shift event stream

infraNodes.label: svcEvents-{env}
infraNodes.description: Planning audit events

flows.name: Employee HRIS Sync
flows.description: A manager updates an employee profile. The change is synced to the HRIS, an event is emitted, and the frontend refreshes the profile.

infraNodes.label: employees-cdc
infraNodes.description: Change Data Capture on employees table

infraNodes.label: employees-db
infraNodes.description: Core employee store

infraNodes.label: svcEvents-{env}
infraNodes.description: HRIS audit events

infraNodes.label: hris-mirror
infraNodes.description: Denormalised HRIS read model

flows.name: BFF Dashboard Aggregation
flows.description: The frontend requests dashboard data. The main BFF fans out to svc-kpis-v2, svc-documents-v2, and svc-intelligence, then aggregates the responses.

infraNodes.label: kpis-db
infraNodes.description: KPI time-series data

infraNodes.label: kpis-stream
infraNodes.description: Real-time KPI event stream

infraNodes.label: intelligence-db
infraNodes.description: Workforce analytics store

flows.name: Shift Creation
flows.description: A planner creates a shift on the planning page. The monolith validates it against labour laws, persists it, pushes metrics to svc-shifts, and emits an async event so the employee gets notified.

steps.action: SQS email-high — notify employee of new shift

infraNodes.label: skello_production
infraNodes.description: Persists shifts in the monolith

infraNodes.label: svcLabourLaws-{env}
infraNodes.description: Labour law rule sets and shop compliance configs

infraNodes.label: svc-shifts
infraNodes.description: Aggregated shift metrics store

infraNodes.description: Async event queue for shift lifecycle events

flows.name: Shift Deletion
flows.description: A planner deletes a shift on the planning page. The monolith validates the deletion against labour laws, removes the shift, recalculates metrics in svc-shifts, and emits an async event so the employee gets notified.

steps.action: POST /validate — check deletion is labour-law compliant
SQS email-high — notify employee of deleted shift

infraNodes.label: skello_production
infraNodes.description: Removes the shift row from the monolith

infraNodes.label: svcLabourLaws-{env}
infraNodes.description: Labour law rule sets checked before deletion

infraNodes.label: svc-shifts
infraNodes.description: Aggregated shift metrics store — recalculated after removal

infraNodes.label: skello-sqs-events
infraNodes.description: Async event queue for shift lifecycle events

infraNodes.label: svcEvents-{env}
infraNodes.description: Audit event store for shift.deleted

infraNodes.label: shift-notify-dispatch
infraNodes.description: Dispatches employee shift cancellation notification emails

flows.name: Shift Update
flows.description: A planner edits an existing shift. The monolith validates the change against labour laws, persists it, recalculates metrics in svc-shifts, and emits an async event so the employee gets notified of the change.

steps.action: POST /validate — check updated shift is labour-law compliant
SQS email-high — notify employee of updated shift

infraNodes.label: skello_production
infraNodes.description: Updates the shift row in the monolith

infraNodes.label: svcLabourLaws-{env}
infraNodes.description: Labour law rule sets checked before update

infraNodes.label: svc-shifts
infraNodes.description: Aggregated shift metrics store — recalculated after update

infraNodes.label: skello-sqs-events
infraNodes.description: Async event queue for shift lifecycle events

infraNodes.label: svcEvents-{env}
infraNodes.description: Audit event store for shift.updated

infraNodes.label: shift-notify-dispatch
infraNodes.description: Dispatches employee shift change notification emails

flows.name: Shift Publication
flows.description: A planner publishes the week’s planning. The monolith marks all draft shifts as published and bulk-enqueues employee notifications via SQS, with the event bus recording a planning.published audit event.

steps.action: POST /v3/shifts/publish — publish all draft shifts for the week
SQS email-high — bulk notify employees of published planning

infraNodes.label: skello_production
infraNodes.description: Bulk-updates shift rows to published state

infraNodes.label: skello-sqs-events
infraNodes.description: Async event queue — one message per employee to notify

infraNodes.label: svcEvents-{env}
infraNodes.description: Audit event store for planning.published

infraNodes.label: shift-notify-dispatch
infraNodes.description: Dispatches bulk published-planning notification emails

flows.name: Leave Request Cancellation
flows.description: An employee or manager cancels a previously submitted leave request. The monolith removes it from svc-requests, logs an audit event, and notifies the other party via email.

steps.action: SQS email-high — notify manager or employee of cancellation

infraNodes.label: svc_requests
infraNodes.description: Removes the leave request row

infraNodes.label: svc-requests-sns
infraNodes.description: SNS-backed queue for request lifecycle events

infraNodes.label: svcEvents-{env}
infraNodes.description: Audit event store for request.cancelled

infraNodes.label: request-notify-dispatch
infraNodes.description: Dispatches leave request cancellation notification

flows.name: Workload Plan Consultation
flows.description: A planner opens the workload forecasting view. The planning BFF fetches the current workload plan and rules from svc-workload-plan to display staffing forecasts alongside the planning grid.

steps.action: GET /planning — load planning context including workload forecast

infraNodes.label: svcWorkloadPlan-{env}
infraNodes.description: Workload plans and forecasting data

infraNodes.label: svc-workload-plan-dlq
infraNodes.description: DLQ for failed workload plan processing jobs

flows.name: Leave Request Approval / Rejection
flows.description: A manager approves or rejects an employee’s leave request. The monolith updates the request status in svc-requests, logs an audit event, and notifies the employee of the decision via email.

steps.action: PATCH /v3/requests/:id — approve or reject leave request
POST /events — emit request.approved or request.rejected event
SQS email-high — notify employee of manager decision

infraNodes.label: svc_requests
infraNodes.description: Persists the updated request status (approved / rejected)

infraNodes.label: svc-requests-sns
infraNodes.description: SNS-backed queue for request lifecycle events

infraNodes.label: svcEvents-{env}
infraNodes.description: Audit event store for request.approved / request.rejected

infraNodes.label: request-notify-dispatch
infraNodes.description: Dispatches leave request decision notification to the employee

flows.name: Workload Plan Creation
flows.description: A planner creates a new workload forecast. The frontend posts directly to svc-workload-plan, which pulls revenue data from svc-pos to calibrate the staffing forecast before persisting the plan.

steps.action: GET /revenue — fetch POS revenue data to calibrate forecast

infraNodes.label: svcWorkloadPlan-{env}
infraNodes.description: Persists the new workload plan and its forecast data

infraNodes.label: svc-workload-plan-dlq
infraNodes.description: DLQ for failed workload plan processing jobs

infraNodes.label: svcPos-{env}
infraNodes.description: POS revenue data used to calibrate staffing forecast

flows.name: Shift Replacement Search
flows.description: A planner searches for a replacement for an uncovered shift. The frontend queries svc-automatic-scheduling which ranks candidates by availability and contract data from svc-employees. The planner confirms an offer via the monolith, which emits an event and notifies the candidate by email.

steps.action: POST /shift-replacements — find replacement candidates for uncovered shift
GET /employees — fetch availability and contract data to rank candidates
POST /v3/shifts/replacements — confirm offer to selected candidate
SQS email-high — notify candidate of replacement offer

infraNodes.label: shift-replacement-rank
infraNodes.description: ML job ranking replacement candidates by availability, contract and proximity

infraNodes.label: svcEmployees-{env}
infraNodes.description: Employee contracts and availability — read to rank candidates

infraNodes.label: skello_production
infraNodes.description: Records the replacement offer on the shift

infraNodes.label: svcEvents-{env}
infraNodes.description: Audit event store for shift.replacement-offered

infraNodes.label: skello-sqs-events
infraNodes.description: Async event queue for shift replacement lifecycle

infraNodes.label: shift-notify-dispatch
infraNodes.description: Dispatches replacement offer notification to the candidate

flows.name: Planning Page Load
flows.description: A manager opens the planning page. svc-bff-planning fans out 6 parallel requests — shifts, employees, labour laws, workload plan, scheduling suggestions and employee search — then assembles the full planning view before responding.

steps.action: GET /planning — request assembled planning page (shopId + week range)
POST /shift-details — fetch all shifts for the selected week [parallel]
GET /employees — fetch full team roster with contracts [parallel]
GET /labour-laws — retrieve labour law rules for the shop [parallel]
GET /v2/workload-plans — fetch workload forecast for the week [parallel]
GET /employees/search — search available staff for open slots [parallel]

infraNodes.label: svc-bff-planning
infraNodes.description: Planning BFF response cache and auto-scheduling request state

infraNodes.label: svc-shifts
infraNodes.description: Aggregated shift metrics and shift detail store

infraNodes.label: svcEmployees-{env}
infraNodes.description: Employee contracts, absences and counters

infraNodes.label: svcLabourLaws-{env}
infraNodes.description: Labour law rule sets for compliance display

infraNodes.label: svcWorkloadPlan-{env}
infraNodes.description: Workload plan forecasts and rules

infraNodes.label: svc-search
infraNodes.description: Employee availability and shift search index

flows.name: Week Copy
flows.description: A manager copies all shifts from one week to another. The monolith creates shifts in bulk, validates each against labour laws, updates shop and org planning metrics, then emits an event so affected employees are notified. Failed shift creations land in a DLQ for manual review.

steps.action: POST /v3/shifts/week-copy — submit bulk copy request with source and target week range
POST /validate-batch — validate each copied shift against labour laws
POST /shift-metrics/shop-and-orga — update shop and org-level planning metrics
SQS email-normal — notify affected employees of copied shifts

infraNodes.label: skello_production
infraNodes.description: Bulk-inserts copied shifts in the monolith

infraNodes.label: svcLabourLaws-{env}
infraNodes.description: Labour law rule sets — read to validate each copied shift

infraNodes.label: svc-shifts
infraNodes.description: Updated shop and org planning metrics after the copy

infraNodes.label: skello-sqs-events
infraNodes.description: Async event queue for bulk shift lifecycle events

infraNodes.label: skello-sqs-events-dlq
infraNodes.description: Dead-letter queue capturing failed shift creations for manual review

infraNodes.label: svcEvents-{env}
infraNodes.description: Audit event store for shifts.bulk-copied

infraNodes.label: shift-notify-dispatch
infraNodes.description: Dispatches notifications to employees for each newly created shift

flows.name: Planning Report Export
flows.description: A manager triggers a planning report export. svc-reports creates an async job, pulls planning data from the monolith and shift details from svc-shifts, generates the report file via a Lambda, uploads it to S3, and returns a pre-signed download URL when the frontend polls for completion.

steps.action: POST /reports — trigger planning report export for the selected period
GET /v3/planning/export — fetch planning data (shifts, employees, hours) for the period
POST /shift-details — fetch detailed shift metrics for the report
GET /reports/{jobId} — poll for report job completion
200 {signedUrl} — return pre-signed S3 URL for report download

infraNodes.label: svcReports-{env}
infraNodes.description: Report job state — tracks pending, processing, complete and failed exports

infraNodes.label: skello_production
infraNodes.description: Planning data source — shifts, employees and schedules pulled for the export

infraNodes.label: svc-shifts
infraNodes.description: Detailed shift metrics included in the report

infraNodes.label: skello-reports-{env}
infraNodes.description: Report file storage — completed files uploaded here and accessed via pre-signed URLs

infraNodes.label: report-generator
infraNodes.description: Async Lambda that generates the report file and uploads it to S3
